_comment: U31/B-U17 -- the daily maintenance-window schedule ENTRY for the page-inventory + evidence-root retention sweep ('read-only; runs in the daily maintenance window' -- items 1 and 3 of the spec). This file IS that entry -- the single source of truth both this repo's doctrine (SKILL.md) and scripts/install-page-inventory-lifecycle-cron.sh read from, so the two can never drift out of sync. The scheduled command below is the evidence-root RETENTION sweep only (tools/ghl_inventory.py --prune) -- fully live-wiring-free and safe to run today (compress-only, never deletes a run-evidence root, never touches a live GoHighLevel object). The live PAGE ENUMERATION half (funnel_lister/page_lister wired to a real seeded browser session) is the live-proof leg, deferred to the operator (parallel to U22) -- see ghl_inventory.py's module docstring 'ONE LIVE GAP' note. Registering this entry live (openclaw cron add) is itself part of that same deferred live-proof leg.
name: skill6-page-inventory-lifecycle
description: Daily maintenance-window evidence-root retention sweep: keeps the newest N (default 10) v2-<RUN_ID> run-evidence roots per funnel-slug group plus every root an open lifecycle card still references, and COMPRESSES (never deletes) older roots. Never touches a live GoHighLevel object -- this entry runs the retention half only; the live page-inventory enumeration + flag/card/execute lifecycle is DEFERRED to the live-proof leg (funnel-id discovery is unproven -- see ghl_inventory.py's module docstring). Non-blocking, read-only w.r.t. any live client page.
